title: Communauté de communes La Brie Nangissienne
summary: The Communauté de communes La Brie Nangissienne is a federation of municipalities (communauté de communes) in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. Its seat is the town Nangis. Its area is 294.1 km2, and its population was 27,809 in 2018.
text:
The Communauté de communes La Brie Nangissienne is a federation of municipalities (communauté de communes) in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. Its seat is the town Nangis. Its area is 294.1 km2, and its population was 27,809 in 2018.

Composition
The communauté de communes consists of the following 20 communes:
